content:
Greetings!
I am somewhat struggling to get the rust documentation tests (rustdoc) of rust/kernel/* running.

If I run the make -j40 LLVM=1 rustdoc, then only HTML files are generated and the documentation tests are not executed nor compiled. If I run make -j40 LLVM=1 V=1 rusttest, then I can see that documentation tests have been compiled (and probably executed?) for rust/macros/lib.rs and also unit tests for str::tests::* have been executed, but still documentation tests for rust/kernel/* were not executed not compiled.

I still believe that the problem lies between a monitor and a chair, am I overlooking some other command/tool?
Thank you! I totally missed that. :man_facepalming:
Daniel Sedlak has marked this topic as resolved.
